themes.label: Creation
themes.summary: This chapter underscores creation, the heavens and earth, or God’s creative ordering work. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 4 verses. Commentary leans on "Isidore of Seville on QUESTIONS ON THE OLD TESTAMENT, EX 14:1-2: Then the plagues are visited...". Word-study detail reinforces "אֶ֣רֶץ: throughout all the land - the earth (at large, or partitively a land)".

evidenceTrail.detail: הַמַּ֛יִם: upon the waters - water; figuratively, juice; by euphemism, urine, semen

themes.label: Wisdom
